title: Welcome to Chemistry Lab Foundations
body: Please read the syllabus in the Files tab and sign the lab safety contract by the end of Week 2. Our first in-person lab is March 20.

title: Lab Notebook Template Due Wednesday
body: Reminder: submit your completed lab notebook template (header section) by Wednesday 11:59 PM. This is required before you can submit your first experiment write-up.

title: Significant Figures Quiz Opens Monday
body: The Measurement and Significant Figures quiz will open Monday March 23 and is due Thursday March 25 at 5:00 PM. Review the Week 2 slides and your notes.
